steps.title: Identify the strongest point of agreement
steps.content: Both texts explicitly describe the same core relationship: organ pipe cacti provide shade that protects tepary beans from heat and light.

steps.title: Find the choice expressing this shared point
steps.content:
Choice C states that organ pipe cacti provide shade protecting tepary beans from heat and light. The other choices either base their claims on details from only one text, contradict the texts' claims, or introduce points neither text addresses.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
